# Beans

```{r, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("pak")
#pak::pak("thiyangt/vegetablesSriLanka")
library("vegetablesSriLanka")
library(knitr)
library(plotly)
library(GGally)
library(patchwork)
library(lubridate)
library(tsibble)
library(feasts)
library(fable)
library(fabletools)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=18, fig.height=10}
vegetables.srilanka <- vegetables.srilanka |>
  mutate( Item = factor(Item, levels = c("Beans",
                                   "Big Onion (Imp)",
                                   "Brinjal",
                                   "Cabbage",
                                   "Carrot",
                                   "Green Chilli",
                                   "Lime",
                                   "Potato (Imp)",
                                   "Pumpkin",
                                   "Snake gourd",
                                   "Tomato",
                                   "Potato (Local)",
                                   "Big Onion (Local)", "Red Onion (Imp)",
                                   "Red Onion (Local)"))) 

```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
#vegetables.srilanka |>
#  as_tsibble(key = c(Item, Type, Market),
#    index = Date) |>
#  scan_gaps()

vegetables_long_tsibble <- vegetables.srilanka |>
  as_tsibble(key = c(Item, Type, Market),
    index = Date) 
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,}
veg_filled <- vegetables_long_tsibble |>
  group_by_key() |>
  fill_gaps() |>
  ungroup() |>
  as_tsibble() |>
  mutate(Year = year(Date))
```

## Dynamic Time Series Plot

### Dambulla: Retail

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tsibble)
library(dplyr)
library(dygraphs)
library(xts)

# Filter for a single series
beans_dambulla <- veg_filled %>%
  filter(Item == "Beans", Type == "Retail", Market == "Dambulla") %>%
  select(Date, Price) %>%
  arrange(Date)  # Ensure chronological order

# Convert to xts
beans_xts <- xts(beans_dambulla$Price, order.by = beans_dambulla$Date)

# Draw dygraph
dygraph(beans_xts, main = "Beans Price in Dambulla (Retail)") %>%
  dyAxis("y", label = "Price (LKR)") %>%
  dyRangeSelector()  # Adds interactive date range
```

### Dambulla: Wholesale

```{r, echo=FALSE,  warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tsibble)
library(dplyr)
library(dygraphs)
library(xts)

# Filter for a single series
beans_dambulla <- veg_filled %>%
  filter(Item == "Beans", Type == "Wholesale", Market == "Dambulla") %>%
  select(Date, Price) %>%
  arrange(Date)  # Ensure chronological order

# Convert to xts
beans_xts <- xts(beans_dambulla$Price, order.by = beans_dambulla$Date)

# Draw dygraph
dygraph(beans_xts, main = "Beans Price in Dambulla (Wholesale)") %>%
  dyAxis("y", label = "Price (LKR)") %>%
  dyRangeSelector()  # Adds interactive date range
```

### Pettah: Retail

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tsibble)
library(dplyr)
library(dygraphs)
library(xts)

# Filter for a single series
beans_dambulla <- veg_filled %>%
  filter(Item == "Beans", Type == "Retail", Market == "Pettah") %>%
  select(Date, Price) %>%
  arrange(Date)  # Ensure chronological order

# Convert to xts
beans_xts <- xts(beans_dambulla$Price, order.by = beans_dambulla$Date)

# Draw dygraph
dygraph(beans_xts, main = "Beans Price in Pettah (Retail)") %>%
  dyAxis("y", label = "Price (LKR)") %>%
  dyRangeSelector()  # Adds interactive date range
```

### Pettah: Wholesale

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tsibble)
library(dplyr)
library(dygraphs)
library(xts)

# Filter for a single series
beans_dambulla <- veg_filled %>%
  filter(Item == "Beans", Type == "Wholesale", Market == "Pettah") %>%
  select(Date, Price) %>%
  arrange(Date)  # Ensure chronological order

# Convert to xts
beans_xts <- xts(beans_dambulla$Price, order.by = beans_dambulla$Date)

# Draw dygraph
dygraph(beans_xts, main = "Beans Price in Pettah (Wholesale)") %>%
  dyAxis("y", label = "Price (LKR)") %>%
  dyRangeSelector()  # Adds interactive date range
```
